zh.lifeSummary: 當Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham於1148年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可史達科特 聖 安德魯時，她的父親Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England29歲，母親Bertha Valoines19歲。她和William De Alfreton至少有1個兒子。她去世於1194年3月1日在英國越可爾斯文比享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾可福哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham于1148年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可史達科特 聖 安德魯时，她的父亲Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England29岁，母亲Bertha Valoines19岁。她和William De Alfreton至少有1个儿子。她去世于1194年3月1日在英国越可爾斯文比享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾可福哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Glanville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): of Norman origin, a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, named from an ancient Germanic personal name of uncertain form and meaning + Old French ville ‘settlement’. This name has frequently been confused with Glanfield, a habitational name from Glanvill Farm in Devon, Clanville in Somerset and Hampshire, or Clanfield in Hampshire, or from some other place likewise named with Old English clǣne ‘clean’ (i.e. free of brambles and undergrowth) + feld ‘pasture, open country’.

en.lifeSummary: When Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham was born in 1148, in Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, was 29 and her mother, Bertha Valoines, was 19. She had at least 1 son with William De Alfreton. She died on 1 March 1194, in Swainby, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Coverham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham est née en 1148, à Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Bertha Valoines, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William De Alfreton. Elle est décédée le 1 mars 1194, à Swainby, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Coverham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham 1148 in Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England 29 und ihre Mutter Bertha Valoines 19. Sie hatte mit William De Alfreton mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 1. März 1194 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Swainby, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Coverham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham è nata il nel 1148 nel Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Bertha Valoines, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con William De Alfreton. Morì il 1 marzo 1194, nel Swainby, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Coverham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라트퍼드 스트 앤드루
ko.lifeSummary: Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham(이)가 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라트퍼드 스트 앤드루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha Valoines(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 William De Alfreton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 3월 1일 영국 요르크실르 스웨이비에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 커버함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham nasceu em 1148, em Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Bertha Valoines, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com William De Alfreton. Ela faleceu em 1 de março de 1194, em Swainby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: стратфорд ст андрю, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham родилась в 1148 г. в местности стратфорд ст андрю, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha Valoines, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William De Alfreton. Она умерла 1 марта 1194 г. в местности свеинби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности ковирам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con William De Alfreton.
